name: agent-handoff
description: Sync Claude Code and Codex agent setup across devices with path tokenization, secret scanning, and a private hub repository.

interface.longDescription: Use the handoff CLI from Codex slash commands to initialize, push, pull, diff, diagnose, and bootstrap Codex profile snapshots. The CLI handles path tokenization, secret scanning, and hub repository storage.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Codex handoff for this machine
Push my Codex setup to the handoff hub
Pull another machine's Codex setup here
